titles.title: I Will Pour Out My Life

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will pour out my life at Thy feet, I will pour out my life at Thy feet, As an offering of love And worship unto thee. (repeat)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will wash His feet with my tears, And dry them with The hairs of my head, As an offering of love And worship unto Thee. (repeat)
